scenes.title: What is Sumaya Restro
scenes.narration: Sumaya Restro is a complete restaurant management platform. Each restaurant gets its own branded website, staff back-office, kitchen display, GST billing, inventory, and mobile apps — all connected in real time. In this walkthrough we use one live demo restaurant to show how every role works together.

scenes.title: Spice Garden — Demo Restaurant
scenes.narration: Our demo restaurant is Spice Garden — Indian fine dining in Ahmedabad with two branches. Guests see a branded homepage with food photos, live offers, and chef specials. Staff use the same URL to log in. Next we follow each role, one at a time.

scenes.title: Customer Role — Online Ordering
scenes.narration: First, the customer role. Guests browse a visual menu — every dish has a photo and price. Add items to the cart and watch the bill update live with GST and service charge. They can also book a table or join the waitlist from the same branded site.

scenes.title: Waiter Role — Table Floor
scenes.narration: Now the waiter role. The table floor shows every table color-coded — green available, red occupied, amber reserved. Counters at the top track capacity. The waiter taps any table to start or add to an order.

scenes.title: Waiter Role — POS Order Entry
scenes.narration: At the table, the waiter builds the order from a photo menu. Each tap adds to the cart. One submit fires a Kitchen Order Ticket to the display — no paper tickets, no shouting to the back.

scenes.title: Kitchen Role — Display System
scenes.narration: The kitchen role runs on a live display. Every ticket shows the KOT number, table, items, and status — queued, preparing, and ready. Tap to advance each ticket. Waiters and customers are notified automatically.

scenes.title: Cashier Role — Billing & GST
scenes.narration: The cashier role handles billing. Every unpaid order is listed with amount and status. Select an order, apply coupon SPICE10 for ten percent off, review CGST and SGST breakdown, then collect payment by cash, UPI, or card and print a GST receipt.

scenes.title: Inventory Role — Stock Control
scenes.narration: The inventory manager sees every ingredient — current stock, unit, reorder level, and cost. Low-stock items are flagged so the team can raise purchase orders before service is disrupted. Suppliers and purchase orders are managed from the same module.

scenes.title: Owner Role — Dashboard & Operations
scenes.narration: The owner role opens the command center — today's sales, order count, active tables, and kitchen queue at a glance. From here the owner manages the menu with photos and prices, reviews staff roles, and monitors branch performance.

scenes.title: Mobile Apps — Every Role
scenes.narration: Every role also works on mobile. Waiters carry the floor plan and POS in their pocket. Kitchen staff advance tickets on a tablet. Customers order with photos from their phone. All screens stay in sync with the web back-office in real time.

scenes.title: Closing
scenes.narration: That is Sumaya Restro with Spice Garden — one platform covering customer ordering, waiter POS, kitchen display, GST billing, inventory, owner analytics, and mobile apps for every role. Production ready. Thank you for watching.
